title: feat: allowlist YoannDev90 for community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt: - Adds YoannDev90 (GitHub ID 182555207) to the community model allowlist

gist.headline: Welcome to the hive, YoannDev90!
gist.blurb: We've added YoannDev90 to the community model allowlist. Time to start building and sharing!
gist.summary: Added GitHub user YoannDev90 (ID 182555207) to the community model allowlist.
gist.impact: YoannDev90 now has the necessary permissions to access and deploy community models on the platform.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot welcoming a new developer to the community, handing them a glowing access pass or key in a lush digital garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a friendly new developer in a lush digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a friendly new developer in a lush digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
